label: Princess Donut
outfit: an ordinary pampered tortoiseshell Persian show cat with fluffy black, beige and white fur, no accessories

label: Transforming blob
outfit: a shapeless quivering mass of hairy jellied goo mid-transformation, with the word 'Waiting…' hovering above it

label: Crowned Princess
outfit: the restored tortoiseshell Persian show cat now wearing a cat-sized jeweled tiara with smoky dark gems and a swirling deep-purple center stone
